summary: A very simple, mostly white landing page with a large centered brand title at the top and a three-panel hero collage beneath it. The overall style is clean and corporate, using thin typography, lots of whitespace, and construction-themed photography with dark overlays and large white text.

layout.summary: A very simple, mostly white landing page with a large centered brand title at the top and a three-panel hero collage beneath it. The overall style is clean and corporate, using thin typography, lots of whitespace, and construction-themed photography with dark overlays and large white text.

sections.name: Top brand header
sections.description: At the very top on a white background, a red stylized "R" logo sits on the left, while the company name is centered across the page in a thin, elegant font with a quoted tagline directly below it.
sections.copy_gist: Red's Residential & Restaurant Construction; "It is our pleasure to build for you"

sections.name: Three-panel service hero collage
sections.description: A wide hero section spans almost the full content width and is split into three equal vertical image panels. Each panel uses a construction-related photo with a semi-dark overlay and oversized white text stacked across lines; smaller supporting text appears near the bottom of each panel.
copy_gist: Building Maintenance / Customized to Your Preferences
Construction Planning / It's All in the Details

sections.name: Secondary navigation links
sections.description: Below the hero, centered text links are arranged in a simple horizontal row with one additional link centered on a lower line, all spaced widely on the white background.

sections.name: Contact and credentials footer area
sections.description: The bottom area contains licensing information on the left, contact phone and email centered with small line icons, and a certification/partner badge on the right. This functions like a footer, though it is visually sparse and not a full multi-column footer.

header.nav_style: Minimal, text-light header on white with a prominent logo at left and centered title/tagline rather than a conventional menu bar.
header.links: No obvious top nav links; navigation appears as centered text links lower on the page.
header.sticky: No visible indication of sticky behavior.

hero.headline_gist: Three service offerings presented as large vertical image cards.
hero.subhead: Top brand tagline and small captions on each card; no single hero paragraph.
hero.primary_cta: No obvious button CTA in the hero.
hero.imagery: Construction-worker, on-site tools, and blueprint/planning imagery with darkened overlays and large white type.

color_impressions.overall_palette_feel: Clean and sparse base palette with strong red branding accents and muted industrial photography.

typography_impressions.heading_body_feel: Thin, modern sans-serif for headings and brand text; small supporting text is similarly light and understated.
typography_impressions.scale: Large hero-type overlay text, medium brand title, small captions and footer text.
typography_impressions.weight: Mostly light to regular weight; hero words are large but not bold.

layout.corner_style: Mostly square edges and straight divisions; little to no rounding apparent.
layout.imagery_style: Real-world, documentary-style construction photography with dark overlays and crop-heavy panels.

footer.columns: Visually three zones: left license text, center contact info, right badge/logo.
footer.links: No dense footer link list visible; the main links appear above the contact area.
footer.legal: License number shown as contractor credential.

layout.responsive_notes: On mobile, the three-panel hero would likely stack vertically or compress into swipeable/full-width blocks, with the brand title and tagline remaining centered or wrapping. The lower nav links would likely stack into a single column or two lines, while contact details would collapse into a vertical list for readability.
